'''chodagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hobbyhorsical|hobbyhorsical]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-d-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hobbyhorsical|hobbyhorsical]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chodagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chodagithi|chodagithi]] || [[word:chodagiji|chodagiji]] || [[word:chodagishi|chodagishi]] || [[word:chodagiki|chodagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chodaguthuthu|chodaguthuthu]] || [[word:chodagujuju|chodagujuju]] || [[word:chodagushushu|chodagushushu]] || [[word:chodagukuku|chodagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chodaguthu|chodaguthu]] || [[word:chodaguju|chodaguju]] || [[word:chodagushu|chodagushu]] || [[word:chodaguku|chodaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chodagufthuf|chodagufthuf]] || [[word:chodagufjuf|chodagufjuf]] || [[word:chodagufshuf|chodagufshuf]] || [[word:chodagufkuf|chodagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chodagethe|chodagethe]] || [[word:chodageje|chodageje]] || [[word:chodageshe|chodageshe]] || [[word:chodageke|chodageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chodagothotho|chodagothotho]] || [[word:chodagojojo|chodagojojo]] || [[word:chodagoshosho|chodagoshosho]] || [[word:chodagokoko|chodagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chodagotho|chodagotho]] || [[word:chodagojo|chodagojo]] || [[word:chodagosho|chodagosho]] || [[word:chodagoko|chodagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chodagofthof|chodagofthof]] || [[word:chodagofjof|chodagofjof]] || [[word:chodagofshof|chodagofshof]] || [[word:chodagofkof|chodagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chodagïfthïf|chodagïfthïf]] || [[word:chodagïfjïf|chodagïfjïf]] || [[word:chodagïfshïf|chodagïfshïf]] || [[word:chodagïfkïf|chodagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chodagïfthïfthïf|chodagïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:chodagïfjïfjïf|chodagïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:chodagïfshïfshïf|chodagïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:chodagïfkïfkïf|chodagïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chodagïfthïf|chodagïfthïf]] || [[word:chodagïfjïf|chodagïfjïf]] || [[word:chodagïfshïf|chodagïfshïf]] || [[word:chodagïfkïf|chodagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chodagïfthïf|chodagïfthïf]] || [[word:chodagïfjïf|chodagïfjïf]] || [[word:chodagïfshïf|chodagïfshïf]] || [[word:chodagïfkïf|chodagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chodagæthæ|chodagæthæ]] || [[word:chodagæjæ|chodagæjæ]] || [[word:chodagæshæ|chodagæshæ]] || [[word:chodagækæ|chodagækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chodagathatha|chodagathatha]] || [[word:chodagajaja|chodagajaja]] || [[word:chodagashasha|chodagashasha]] || [[word:chodagakaka|chodagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chodagatha|chodagatha]] || [[word:chodagaja|chodagaja]] || [[word:chodagasha|chodagasha]] || [[word:chodagaka|chodagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chodagafthaf|chodagafthaf]] || [[word:chodagafjaf|chodagafjaf]] || [[word:chodagafshaf|chodagafshaf]] || [[word:chodagafkaf|chodagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chodagasha|chodagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chodagshësha|chodagshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chodagrosha|chodagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chodagmusha|chodagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chodagyasha|chodagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochodagnkshësha|gochodagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochodagnkrosha|gochodagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochodagnkmusha|gochodagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochodagnkyasha|gochodagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chodadagasha|chodadagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chodadagshësha|chodadagshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chodadagrosha|chodadagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chodadagmusha|chodadagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chodadagyasha|chodadagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochodadagnkshësha|gochodadagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochodadagnkrosha|gochodadagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochodadagnkmusha|gochodadagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochodadagnkyasha|gochodadagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chedægasha|chedægasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chedægshësha|chedægshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chedægrosha|chedægrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chedægmusha|chedægmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chedægyasha|chedægyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochedægnkshësha|gochedægnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochedægnkrosha|gochedægnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochedægnkmusha|gochedægnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochedægnkyasha|gochedægnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chodfagasha|chodfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chodfagshësha|chodfagshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chodfagrosha|chodfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chodfagmusha|chodfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chodfagyasha|chodfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochodfagnkshësha|gochodfagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochodfagnkrosha|gochodfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochodfagnkmusha|gochodfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochodfagnkyasha|gochodfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
